items.caption: A collection of children's backpacks laid out on a beige carpeted floor. the backpacks are of various colors and designs, including pink, purple, green, blue, and gray. some backpacks feature cartoon characters, such as disney princesses and hello kitty. the backpacks are arranged in a somewhat haphazard manner, with some overlapping and others spread out. there is no visible text on the backpacks. the style of the image is candid and appears to be taken in a home environment.

Four backpacks with a unique design feature: a circular window on the front. each backpack is a different color: orange, blue, green, and pink. they are arranged in a two-by-two grid, with the orange and blue backpacks on the top row and the green and pink backpacks on the bottom row. the backpacks have a mesh pocket on the front and a zipper closure. the background is plain and white, emphasizing the backpacks.
a trunk full of backpacks and other bags.
some backpacks and luggage are on the floor.
assorted backpacks sitting around on the floor
